name: MalShare
description: Look up stored metadata for a malware sample by MD5, SHA-1, or SHA-256 hash.

auth.hint: Register with MalShare and send your key in the api_key query parameter.

tools.name: get_sample_details
tools.description: Return stored metadata for a malware sample hash.

params.name: action
params.description: Use details for the selected metadata lookup.

params.name: hash
params.description: MD5, SHA-1, or SHA-256 sample hash.

tools.name: get_daily_hashes
tools.description: List malware sample hashes added during the past 24 hours.

params.name: action
params.description: Use getlist to receive the JSON daily hash list.
